titleZh: 新《公司法》下董事会催缴出资的法定义务
titleEn: The Board’s Legal Obligation to Call Up Shareholders in Arrears of Contributions under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 就董事会对未按时足额出资股东的催缴程序、催缴效力和失权风险进行解读，兼顾实务操作与争议风险。
abstractEn: Practical explanation of board-led contribution calls under the new contribution and forfeiture rules.
